rag_rules: Place input range assumptions in component type annexes using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumption and guarantee declarations within annex blocks.
Ensure type consistency between declared AGREE variables and AADL port/data types.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be syntactically valid and use only visible identifiers from the AADL model.
Assumptions and guarantees should be scoped to component types or implementations based on their referenced features.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly represented in the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Assumptions and guarantees must reference valid component features or declared variables.
Boolean expressions in AGREE should match the actual data types of the referenced ports.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level assignments in component type contracts.
Do not assume that AADL property names are automatically available as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and scope preservation rules
